response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is below our minimum sharing threshold (0.10 vs 0.95 required), we are in islanded critical state with 22 min autonomy, and you are on our distrusted peers list—all outbound sharing is suspended until grid reconnection and our SoC recovers above 80%.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r1c1. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via dr_aggregator circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.95, distrusted_peers=['r1c1'].
Your latest belief: Islanded critical SoC (37%, ~22 min autonomy). Network-wide deficit crisis. R2c2 flagged distrusted by r1c1. All outbound sharing suspended to prevent battery depletion and cascade failure. Aggregator must prioritize grid reconnection as only viable recovery path. No new commitments until SoC > 80%..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
